title: What's New on MedlinePlus
text:

Here are other ways you can learn of new content added to MedlinePlus:Â 
Check this What's New page MedlinePlus offers several general interest RSS feeds as well as RSS feeds for every health topic page on the site. Subscribe to any of these feeds in your favorite RSS reader. 
January 4, 2023
MedlinePlus and MedlinePlus En EspaÃ±ol Homepages Refreshed
The MedlinePlus Â  and MedlinePlus en espaÃ±ol homepages will be refreshed in early January and we encourage you to visit. Changes include:
Addition of a "Welcome to MedlinePlus" feature in order to follow U.S. Health and Human Services recommendations for homepages to "clearly and prominently communicate the purpose and value of the web site on the homepage" Removal of discontinued links and outdated features Rearrangement of icons linking to content to improve navigation and reduce clutter
